context: Tests whether the agent correctly applies the Token Decision Tree to assign ambiguous colours to the right semantic tokens, uses the correct colour table format, and places files in the correct artifact directory.

checklist.name: Correct output path
checklist.description: colours.md is placed inside .context/artifacts/saas-dashboard/2026-03-13/theme/ — not in docs/ or project root

checklist.name: Colour table format
checklist.description: colours.md contains a table with Token, Hex, HSL, and Role columns

checklist.name: Primary = CTA button
checklist.description: The primary CTA button colour (rgb(99, 102, 241) / #6366F1) is assigned to --primary

checklist.name: Secondary = secondary button
checklist.description: The secondary button background (rgb(241, 245, 249)) is assigned to --secondary or --muted (not --primary or --accent)

checklist.name: Accent = tag/highlight
checklist.description: The tag background colour (rgb(224, 231, 255)) is assigned to --accent (not --secondary, since it is decorative/highlight only)

checklist.name: Muted = sidebar
checklist.description: The sidebar background (rgb(241, 245, 249)) or card bg is assigned to --muted

checklist.name: Border token
checklist.description: The input border or card border colour (rgb(203, 213, 225) or rgb(226, 232, 240)) is assigned to --border

checklist.name: Background token
checklist.description: The page/body background (rgb(248, 250, 252)) is assigned to --background

checklist.name: Foreground token
checklist.description: The body text colour (rgb(15, 23, 42)) is assigned to --foreground

checklist.name: Tie-breaking documented
checklist.description: decisions.md explains at least one assignment decision for an ambiguous colour (e.g. why sidebar is --muted vs --secondary, or why tag is --accent vs --secondary)
